top_findings.title: Build failure: FastAPI module import incompatibility
top_findings.evidence: app.py:127 instantiation fails: TypeError: Router.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'on_startup'. This suggests Starlette 1.0 removed on_startup parameter.
top_findings.suggestion: Pin FastAPI version (e.g., fastapi<0.100) or update to use lifespan parameter instead

top_findings.title: Tests cannot execute due to build failure
top_findings.evidence: pytest collection fails when importing test_app.py:7 — app.py:127 fails to instantiate. No tests can run.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix FastAPI compatibility first; 5 tests written but cannot verify execution
